# Read the Primary Category Information of an App Info

**Web Service Endpoint**

Get an app’s primary App Store category.

## Reading Categories

- **Read the Secondary Category Information of an App Info**: Get an app’s secondary App Store category.
- **GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/primaryCategory**
- **GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/secondaryCategory**
